---
title: "R Codespace — Quarto Starter"
author: "Your Name"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Setup

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(knitr)
```

## Quick sanity check

```{r}
tibble(
  package = c("tidyverse", "dplyr", "patchwork", "fs", "knitr"),
  version = map_chr(package, ~ as.character(packageVersion(.x)))
) |>
  kable()
```

## Example plot

```{r}
#| label: fig-demo
#| fig-cap: "A quick ggplot2 demo"

ggplot(diamonds |> slice_sample(n = 1000), aes(carat, price, colour = cut)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1.5) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d() +
  labs(
    title   = "Diamond carat vs price",
    x       = "Carat",
    y       = "Price (USD)",
    colour  = "Cut"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```
